posts.text: Recently PPL announced this biopharmaapac.com Piramal Pharma Solutions Partners With Botanix Pharmaceuticals To Strengthen... Piramal Pharma Solutions Partners With Botanix Pharmaceuticals To Strengthen Sofdra Supply Chain I tried to search using AI and it’s medium to long term impact on PPL. This is a tech transfer deal when existing commercial product is being transferred to PPL’s API site. image 786×534 103 KB What the deal actually is PPS will initiate development and validation of Sofpironium Bromide API at its Riverview, Michigan facility, with an option to later validate at its Aurora,…
